pr.title: Bring past work on PObj over and match a basic function
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Ported prior PObj header/struct work into src/sysdolphin and matched the simple HSD_PObjGetFlags function in C. The PR introduced src/sysdolphin/pobj.h with PObj-related flags, setup enum values, structs, class-info typedefs, casts/macros, and the HSD_PObjGetFlags prototype; added src/sysdolphin/pobj.c implementing a null-safe flags accessor; removed the corresponding assembly body from asm/pobj.s; and added pobj.o to obj_files.mk before the remaining asm/pobj.o.
what_changed: Added new header src/sysdolphin/pobj.h containing PObj constants, flags, setup enum values, and struct declarations/typedefs for HSD_PObj, HSD_PObjDesc, HSD_VtxDescList, HSD_Envelope, HSD_EnvelopeDesc, HSD_ShapeSet, HSD_ShapeSetDesc, HSD_ShapeAnim, HSD_ShapeAnimJoint, and HSD_PObjInfo.
Added PObj class/cast macros HSD_POBJ, HSD_POBJ_INFO, and HSD_POBJ_METHOD, plus extern HSD_PObjInfo hsdPObj and the prototype u16 HSD_PObjGetFlags(HSD_PObj* pobj).
Added src/sysdolphin/pobj.c with HSD_PObjGetFlags implemented as a null check followed by returning pobj->flags, otherwise returning 0.
Removed the hand-written assembly implementation of HSD_PObjGetFlags from asm/pobj.s.

Updated obj_files.mk to build $(BUILD_DIR)/src/sysdolphin/pobj.o before $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/pobj.o, allowing the matched C function to replace the removed assembly while keeping remaining PObj assembly linked.
smart_moves: Started PObj decompilation by landing a broad type/header scaffold first, giving later functions concrete field names and offsets to target.
Chose a very small, easily verifiable accessor function for the first PObj C match: the assembly was just a null check, halfword load from offset 0x0C, and zero return on NULL.
Placed the C object before the remaining asm object in obj_files.mk while deleting only the matched HSD_PObjGetFlags assembly, preserving unmatched PObj code in asm/pobj.s.
The HSD_PObj layout makes the matched load at offset 0x0C correspond to the u16 flags field after HSD_Class parent, next, and verts, supporting the struct layout used by the C implementation.
decomp_lessons: For decompilation of large object systems, a header-only struct import can be valuable even before many functions are matched, because it establishes shared field names, unions, callback signatures, and constants.
Simple getters are good early matches for validating struct offsets: HSD_PObjGetFlags confirmed that flags is read as a u16 at offset 0x0C and returns 0 when the object pointer is NULL.
When partially migrating an assembly file to C, remove only the matched global from the assembly and add the new C object alongside the remaining asm object in build order.

Forward references to related object types such as HSD_JObj, HSD_JObjDesc, HSD_ShapeSet, HSD_SList, HSD_AObj, and FObjData can keep a new subsystem header usable without requiring all related headers or structs to be fully decompiled at once.
naming_conventions: PObj subsystem files use lowercase filenames: src/sysdolphin/pobj.c and src/sysdolphin/pobj.h.
Runtime structs use HSD_ prefixes and underscore-tagged struct names, e.g. typedef struct _HSD_PObj { ... } HSD_PObj.
Descriptor variants use Desc suffixes, e.g. HSD_PObjDesc, HSD_EnvelopeDesc, and HSD_ShapeSetDesc.
PObj constants use uppercase POBJ_ prefixes for flags such as POBJ_ANIM, POBJ_SKIN, POBJ_SHAPEANIM, POBJ_ENVELOPE, POBJ_CULLFRONT, and POBJ_CULLBACK.
Shape set constants use SHAPESET_ prefixes, e.g. SHAPESET_AVERAGE and SHAPESET_ADDITIVE.
GX-related constants use GX_ prefixes, e.g. GX_NOP, GX_VAT_MASK, and GX_OPCODE_MASK.
PObj setup enum values use SETUP_ prefixes and are grouped under typedef enum _PObjSetupFlag ... PObjSetupFlag.
Class helper macros use HSD_POBJ, HSD_POBJ_INFO, and HSD_POBJ_METHOD naming in line with other HSD class-style cast/method macros.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Matched HSD_PObjGetFlags by translating assembly cmplwi r3,0 / beq / lhz r3,0xc(r3) / blr / li r3,0 into C: if (pobj != NULL) return pobj->flags; return 0;
Used a u16 return type and u16 flags field so the compiler emits a halfword load corresponding to lhz at offset 0x0C.
Kept unmatched functions, beginning with func_8036B8E8, in asm/pobj.s after removing only the matched HSD_PObjGetFlags block.
Added src/sysdolphin/pobj.o to TEXT_O_FILES immediately before asm/pobj.o to combine newly matched C with remaining assembly for the same subsystem.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify src/sysdolphin/pobj.h to validate or rename the initial PObj struct fields.
Find later matches in src/sysdolphin/pobj.c that reuse HSD_PObjInfo, PObjSetupFlag, HSD_ShapeSet, or HSD_Envelope types.
Search for subsequent removal of func_8036B8E8 or other symbols from asm/pobj.s.
Search for review or later fixes around POBJ_SKIN being defined as (0 << 12) and SHAPESET_ADDITIVE as 1 << 1 without parentheses.
